title: PixelToCamera Result
description: Returns the CameraX, CameraY and Angle position coordinates in the camera coordinate frame.
notes:
The xVar and yVar values are returned in millimeters since the Camera Coordinate Frame is calibrated in millimeters.
  The uVar value is returned in degrees.

It should be noted that the PixelToCamera result can only be calculated for vision calibrations which have been calibrated.
  If  not calibrated then the PixelToCamera result cause an error to occur.
see_also:
